mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job growth above 100k signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k, or IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates expanding real economic activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between INDPRO and HOUST shows negative coefficient in 60d forward returns, or combined 60d return performance falls below 10% in 3 consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) signals improving manufacturing capacity utilization, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns show negative correlation with INDPRO changes (IC < -0.05) in 3 consecutive 6-month periods.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in CPI inflation (CPIAUCSL) below 2% signals central bank credibility, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 50%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL stays below 2%, or IC falls below 0.03 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in unemployment (UNRATE) and rising consumer credit (RSAFS) indicate strong household financial health, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between UNRATE and RSAFS shows negative coefficient in 60d forward returns, or combined 60d return performance falls below 8% in 3 consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 6% signals tightening labor market conditions that drive corporate profit growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 50%+ of instances where UNRATE stays below 6%, or IC falls below 0.04 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) combined with declining capacity utilization (INDPRO) signals overheating manufacturing sectors, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns show positive correlation with INDPRO changes (IC > 0.05) in 3 consecutive 6-month periods.
